design_philosophy.core_loop: Two-player cooperative beat 'em up combat against waves of themed enemies (Jury, symbiote creatures) with character switching between Spider-Man and Venom
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Surviving repetitive enemy encounters across themed locations; managing crowd control with limited move variety
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Playing as both Spider-Man and Venom as a cooperative duo to defeat Carnage and symbiote threats across comic-inspired locations
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Heavily emphasizes multiplayer cooperation as core experience; uses Marvel license to feature superhero cameos (Captain America, Ghost Rider, Hawkeye, Daredevil) as assistance mechanics rather than playable characters. Unambiguous stance on duology storytelling—direct sequel to Maximum Carnage with minimal narrative innovation.

difficulty.lives_system: Standard lives system (infinite lives cheat code available via password GNMN79)
difficulty.checkpointing: Level-based progression with password/level-select system (accessible via code SCBCRS)
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Limited agency; reviews criticize 'cheap combat' with 'constant flow of unavoidable hits,' suggesting difficulty stems from enemy design rather than player skill expression

progression.upgrade_system: Character move variety available (praised by reviewers as 'large variety of moves'), but upgrade mechanism not detailed in sources
progression.unlock_mechanism: Level-select password system provides direct access to later stages
replayability_hooks: Two-character playstyle (Spider-Man vs. Venom offer different combat approaches)
Hidden level select encourages speedrunning or skipping ahead

world_building_techniques: Loose comic book adaptation (follows Venom: Lethal Protector storyline)
Location-based progression (San Francisco underground city, Life Foundation Headquarters)
Enemy archetypes from source material (Jury, symbiote offspring, Carnage)
NPC cameo assistance from Marvel heroes

boss_design.philosophy: Thematic enemy encounters rooted in Lethal Protector arc: confrontation with underground antagonists, The Jury organization, five symbiote children, and final Carnage encounter at Life Foundation
notable_bosses: Five symbiote offspring (mid-game bosses derived from Life Foundation symbiote seeds)

faction_indicators: Spider-Man faction (hero affiliation, cameo ally network)
Carnage antagonism (shared enemy uniting both protagonists)
danger_signals: Symbiote proliferation (five symbiote children created from stolen seeds)
environmental_storytelling: San Francisco underground digger location (class/infrastructure theme)
Life Foundation Headquarters (corporate consolidation of power)

sources_used: tcrf - Separation Anxiety (SNES) - The Cutting Room Floor
